Our Infrastructure

Enterprise-grade data centers with AMD Ryzen 9 7900X and Intel Xeon E5-2699 V4 processors, 5Gbps network, and NetMoon DDoS protection across Mumbai and Noida, India.

Advanced CPU Architecture
AMD
Ryzen 9 7900X
  • Cores/Threads:12C/24T
  • Boost Clock:5.6 GHz
  • Memory:DDR5
  • TDP:170W
  • Architecture:Zen 4
Intel
Xeon E5-2699 V4
  • Cores/Threads:22C/44T
  • Boost Clock:3.6 GHz
  • Memory:DDR4 ECC
  • TDP:145W
  • Socket:LGA 2011-3

Powered By Enterprise Hardware

MetroX infrastructure combines dual-socket architecture with enterprise-grade components. Our cluster features the AMD Ryzen 9 7900X and Intel Xeon E5-2699 V4, delivering exceptional single and multi-threaded performance with zero overselling.

  • ⚙️ CPU ArchitectureRyzen 9 7900X + Xeon E5-2699 V4
  • 🖥️ Memory TypeDDR4/DDR5 ECC RAM
  • 💾 Storage TierNVMe Gen4 SSD
  • 🌐 Network Uplink5Gbps Dedicated
  • 🛡️ DDoS ProtectionNetMoon Blackhole + Enterprise
  • 🌍 LocationMumbai & Noida, India
  • 📊 PanelPterodactyl v1
  • 🔄 BackupsDaily Automated
